case_title: AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. VS. MICHAEL ROSE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSE, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 965 SUTTER STREET #701, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, MICHAEL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL. $102.57 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, MICHAEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, MICHAEL
